   1 | //! OpenAI API 兼容层
   2 | //!
   3 | //! 将内部类型转换为 async-openai 类型，供 Kimi/OpenAI 等兼容 API 使用
   4 | 
   5 | use crate::services::api::{
   6 |     provider_protocol::{
   7 |         normalize_messages_for_capabilities, ProviderCapabilities, ProviderProtocolFamily,
   8 |     },
   9 |     sanitize_assistant_content, ChatRequest, ChatResponse, Message, ToolCall, ToolChoice, Usage,
  10 | };
  11 | use anyhow::{Context, Result};
  12 | use async_openai::types::{
  13 |     ChatCompletionMessageToolCall, ChatCompletionNamedToolChoice,
  14 |     ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessage, ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessageContent,
  15 |     ChatCompletionRequestMessage, ChatCompletionRequestSystemMessage,
  16 |     ChatCompletionRequestToolMessage, ChatCompletionRequestUserMessage, ChatCompletionTool,
  17 |     ChatCompletionToolChoiceOption, ChatCompletionToolType, CreateChatCompletionRequest,
  18 |     CreateChatCompletionResponse, FunctionCall, FunctionName, FunctionObject,
  19 | };
  20 | 
  21 | pub fn convert_request(request: ChatRequest, model: &str) -> CreateChatCompletionRequest {
  22 |     let strict_tool_schema = strict_tool_schema_enabled();
  23 |     let messages: Vec<ChatCompletionRequestMessage> = normalize_messages_for_capabilities(
  24 |         ProviderCapabilities::for_family(ProviderProtocolFamily::OpenAiCompatible),
  25 |         request.messages,
  26 |     )
  27 |     .into_iter()
  28 |     .map(convert_message)
  29 |     .collect();
  30 | 
  31 |     let mut req = CreateChatCompletionRequest {
  32 |         model: if request.model.is_empty() {
  33 |             model.to_string()
  34 |         } else {
  35 |             request.model
  36 |         },
  37 |         messages,
  38 |         temperature: request.temperature,
  39 |         max_completion_tokens: request.max_tokens,
  40 |         tools: None,
  41 |         tool_choice: request.tool_choice.map(convert_tool_choice),
  42 |         ..Default::default…
